title: Review an API contract change
summary: Produce a wire-level compatibility matrix, client-impact register, and evidence-based API rollout decision.

required: immutable released and proposed wire contracts with protocol revisions
handler serializer default error and routing implementation evidence plus runtime observations when claimed
applicable compatibility deprecation and severity policy
optional: known-client parser contract inventory ownership and executed parser-test results
per-change sanitized monitoring metrics rollout capability and rollback evidence

outputs: bidirectional API compatibility report and finding register
observed and unknown client-impact register
versioning deprecation rollout monitoring and rollback plan
prerequisites: released and proposed contracts are immutable parseable and protocol-complete
candidate implementation behavior can be reconciled with the proposed contract
compatibility and deprecation policies identify the reviewed API surface

requires_human_approval: shipping a breaking change
removing a deprecated field
forbidden_actions: assuming generated schemas cover runtime behavior
silently changing defaults
exposing internal errors

bounded first-contribution brief with validation review safety and closing criteria

inventing architecture ownership commands access or validation results
